meaning: v.摇摆,摆动,回转,旋转n.秋千,摇摆,摆动
examples: I need to work on my swing.
When he's not on the tennis court, you'll find him practising his golf swing.
He took a wild swing at the ball.
Indeed, Saddam's sentencing was only a brief interruption in the president's final campaign swing.
By the first decade of the twenty-first century, I could no longer swing a golf club.
